name: Tuna and Mushroom Pasta Salad

ingredients.item: can tuna in oil, drained, flaked
Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste

method: Cook pasta as directed on package. When cooked through but al dente, remove from heat, drain and rinse.
Combine mayonnaise, lemon juice, oil and salt and pepper in a cup.
Add tuna, apple, pepper and mushrooms to pasta. Pour over dressing and toss until well combined.
This salad brings together a selection of ingredients that are both delicious to eat and visually appealing, meaning
there's something for everyone to enjoy! It's also great served alongside a warm dish such as chicken curry or
